name: GM Comic (Galeri Madloki)
description: GM Comic is the backup channel of Galeri Madloki, an Indonesian adult comic gallery with about 1,400 subscribers (July 2026). It shares adult comic artwork; content is primarily in Indonesian.
cons: Backup channel of a main gallery
seoDescription: Indonesian adult comic gallery channel. Verified real and active July 2026 — subscribers, pros & cons and how to join.
